issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if your Leader has the {Dressrosa} type, not if a card exists on board.
Condition parameter should be 'type' not 'name'. LeaderHasType condition uses 'type' field to specify the leader type.
Filter should specify 'count' to indicate 'up to 1' activation limit. Current filter lacks the count constraint.
